title: Add Wave 38 manager provider handoff fit regression matrix
description: Add regression coverage for manager handoff candidate fit preview payloads, recommendation guardrails, and baseline assignment behavior while preserving current provider directory/profile flows.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix covers provider-candidate fit preview success and manager-role guardrail scenarios
Assertions verify additive candidate recommendation metadata without breaking the baseline handoff contract
Testing strategy references Wave 38 scope and protects current provider directory and handoff behavior
